rules.name: Mars in 8th — Major Surgical Intervention Quality
rules.description: Mars placed in or ruling the 8th house indicates that the medical event will manifest as a major surgical intervention rather than conservative treatment.

required.condition: Mars is in the 8th house OR Mars rules the 8th house
required.description: Mars must have direct connection to the 8th house (placement or lordship)

optional.description: Ketu's involvement makes surgery more sudden and emergency-based

interpretation.summary: The medical event will require major surgical intervention — cutting, blood, and invasive procedure.
interpretation.detail: Mars in/ruling the 8th house strongly indicates that whatever health crisis occurs during the appropriate Dasha/transit window, it will require surgical resolution rather than pharmaceutical or conservative treatment.

rules.name: Saturn Dominant — Chronic Ongoing Disease Quality
rules.description: When Saturn dominates the medical configuration (placed in or aspecting 6th/8th), the medical event will be chronic, slow-developing, and require long-term management.

required.condition: Saturn is in 6th/8th house OR Saturn aspects 6th/8th house OR Saturn rules 6th/8th house
required.description: Saturn must dominate the disease houses through placement, aspect, or lordship

optional.condition: Mars does not aspect or conjunct Saturn
optional.description: Absence of Mars confirms chronic (non-surgical) quality

interpretation.summary: The medical event is chronic and ongoing — requires long-term management, not acute intervention.
interpretation.detail: Saturn's dominance ensures the medical condition develops slowly, persists for long periods, and requires sustained pharmaceutical or lifestyle management rather than acute surgical intervention. Conditions like diabetes, arthritis, and chronic kidney disease.

rules.name: Rahu Dominant — Acute Mysterious Illness Quality
rules.description: When Rahu dominates the medical configuration, the event will be acute, sudden, mysterious in nature, and difficult to diagnose initially.

required.condition: Rahu is in 6th/8th house OR Rahu conjuncts/aspects the 6th/8th lord
required.description: Rahu must dominate the medical configuration

interpretation.summary: The medical event will be mysterious, hard to diagnose, and require specialist investigation.
interpretation.detail: Rahu's influence makes the medical event confusing — unusual symptoms, multiple possible diagnoses, need for advanced testing, and often an element of toxicity or allergic reaction. The illness 'hides' or mimics other conditions.

rules.name: Jupiter Aspect/Involvement — Recovery & Healing Quality
rules.description: When Jupiter aspects or is involved in the medical configuration, the outcome quality shifts toward recovery, healing, and manageable treatment.

required.condition: Jupiter aspects the 6th/8th house OR Jupiter aspects the Lagna lord OR Jupiter is in Lagna
required.description: Jupiter must provide protective influence to the medical configuration

optional.condition: Jupiter is strong (exalted, own sign, or well-dignified)
optional.description: Strong Jupiter provides maximum healing potential

interpretation.summary: The medical event, while serious, will resolve positively — recovery is indicated and healing will be complete.
interpretation.detail: Jupiter's protective influence ensures that even serious medical events have favorable outcomes. Surgery succeeds, diseases respond to treatment, and the native recovers fully. Jupiter provides divine protection to the body.

rules.name: Maraka Lords Active — Life-Threatening Quality
rules.description: When Maraka lords (2nd/7th) dominate the medical event timing, the quality is life-threatening and requires emergency intervention.

required.condition: 2nd lord AND/OR 7th lord are active in Dasha AND connected to 6th/8th house
required.description: Maraka lords must be activated and connected to disease/surgery houses

optional.condition: Jupiter does not aspect Lagna or Lagna lord
optional.description: Absence of Jupiter's protection increases life-threatening potential

interpretation.summary: The medical event is life-threatening — emergency intervention required, outcome uncertain without immediate action.
interpretation.detail: Maraka lords bring death-inflicting energy to the medical event. When combined with disease/surgery house activation, the event becomes genuinely life-threatening. Emergency medical intervention is critical.

rules.name: Venus Involvement — Manageable/Routine Medical Quality
rules.description: When Venus influences the medical configuration, the event is manageable, routine, and the native recovers quickly with comfort during treatment.

required.condition: Venus aspects Lagna or 6th house OR Venus is in Lagna OR Venus aspects the active Dasha lord
required.description: Venus must provide softening influence to the medical event

interpretation.summary: The medical event is routine and manageable — good medical care, comfortable recovery, minor procedure.
interpretation.detail: Venus's influence softens the medical event. Procedures are routine, recovery is comfortable, and the native has access to quality care and pleasant surroundings during healing. The event does not significantly disrupt life quality.

rules.name: Ketu Dominant — Sudden Emergency Surgery Quality
rules.description: When Ketu dominates the medical configuration, the event is sudden, unexpected, and requires emergency surgical intervention without prior warning.

required.condition: Ketu is in 6th/8th house OR Ketu conjuncts Mars OR Ketu aspects the 8th lord
required.description: Ketu must dominate the surgical/emergency configuration

optional.description: Mars-Ketu conjunction makes the emergency surgical event more severe

interpretation.summary: The medical event is sudden and requires emergency surgery — no warning, no time for preparation.
interpretation.detail: Ketu (headless planet of suddenness and detachment) creates medical events that arrive without warning — accidents requiring emergency surgery, appendix ruptures, sudden internal emergencies. The native is 'cut' (Ketu = severance) without preparation.

rules.name: Moon Afflicted — Psychosomatic/Mental Health Quality
rules.description: When the Moon is afflicted in the medical configuration, the event manifests as psychosomatic illness or mental health crisis rather than purely physical disease.

required.condition: Moon is afflicted (conjunct/aspected by Saturn, Rahu, or Mars) AND connected to 6th/8th/12th house
required.description: Moon must be afflicted and connected to medical houses

optional.description: 12th house connection adds hospitalization for mental health

interpretation.summary: The medical event is primarily mental/psychosomatic — depression, anxiety, psychiatric crisis, or mind-body disorder.
interpretation.detail: An afflicted Moon shifts the medical event toward the mental/emotional realm. Rather than physical surgery or disease, the crisis manifests as psychiatric emergency, psychosomatic illness, severe depression, or anxiety disorder requiring mental health intervention.

rules.name: 12th House Dominant — Hospitalization & Confinement Quality
rules.description: When the 12th house dominates the medical configuration, the event quality involves extended hospitalization, bed-rest, and confinement in a medical facility.

required.condition: 12th lord is active in Dasha AND/OR multiple planets in 12th house AND/OR Lagna lord transiting 12th
required.description: The 12th house must be the dominant feature of the medical configuration

optional.condition: Saturn aspects or is in 12th house
optional.description: Saturn adds long duration to the hospitalization

interpretation.summary: The medical event requires extended hospitalization — the native will be confined to a medical facility for treatment.
interpretation.detail: The 12th house (beds, hospitals, confinement) dominating the medical configuration means the event involves significant time in a hospital or care facility. This may be for surgery recovery, intensive treatment, or isolation-requiring conditions.

rules.name: Mercury Afflicted — Nervous System & Communication Disorder Quality
rules.description: When Mercury is afflicted in the medical configuration, the event manifests as nervous system disorders, speech/hearing issues, or neurological conditions.

required.condition: Mercury is afflicted (conjunct Rahu/Ketu, aspected by Saturn) AND connected to 6th/8th house
required.description: Mercury must be afflicted and connected to medical houses

optional.description: Ketu-Mercury adds sudden neurological events (stroke, seizure)

interpretation.summary: The medical event involves the nervous system — neurological conditions, speech disorders, or communication-affecting illness.
interpretation.detail: Mercury governs the nervous system, communication, and cognitive function. When afflicted in a medical configuration, the event manifests as neurological conditions — neuropathy, speech disorders, hearing loss, cognitive decline, or in severe cases, stroke or seizures.
